name: Alligator Bites
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds well trimmed Alligator tenderloin, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the alligator in the dry Dixie Fry seasoning, shaking off excess.
2. Deep fry the alligator in cooking oil using a deep fryer if available.
3. Cook until golden brown.
4. Serve hot with Tartar sauce or red horseradish cocktail sauce.
5. If two pounds is too much, use one pound of alligator meat.
Cut into bite-sized pieces to ensure they cook quickly and are tender.
